testcase.name: tests.test_flask
testcase.error: tests/test_flask.py:1: in <module> from mapkick.flask import Map, AreaMap mapkick/flask/__init__.py:9: in <module> mapkick_blueprint = Blueprint('mapkick', __name__, static_folder=static_folder, static_url_path='/static/mapkick') ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: Blueprint.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'static_folder'
